title: RasaOS Frontend Layout
description: Canon doc 10 Appendix A (v1.0.0) screen/region layout document, expressed as JSON Schema draft-2020-12. Authored home: RasaOS/schema (public). Vendored into the kernel at contracts/layout/ and mirrored to core/src/canvas/layout-schema.json (re-sync: cp contracts/layout/rasa.layout.v1.json core/src/canvas/layout-schema.json). The component enum is the full frozen-18 library plus the canvas-motivated additions (doc 10 lock FE-002); deployment-time narrowing is the kernel component allowlist's concern (TASK-226), not the schema's. Per-component prop shapes are generally left open; the exception is html-embed, whose size caps are contract-enforced here (TASK-249 / canon SA-027).

component.description: Doc 10 §4 component library. The first 18 are the v1.0.0 frozen set (lock FE-002); markdown-block / button-row / card-list are the canvas-motivated v1.1 additions (canon DOC-10-edit-canvas-components, review approved 2026-07-02; doc 10 absorption pending); html-embed is the sandboxed-artifact region for 3D + animation (canon SA-027 / TASK-249) — its prop shape is constrained below.

frame.description: Optional absolute placement in canvas-local CSS px — origin (0,0) at the top-left of the canvas surface (canon SA-028). Regions with a frame render absolutely; regions without flow per layout_grid. Overlap is legal; z-order is document order.

allOf.description: html-embed (canon SA-027 / TASK-249): a sandboxed HTML/JS artifact region for 3D + animation. props.html is the self-contained document the shell renders in a sandboxed iframe; props.height is the fixed artifact height in CSS px. Size caps are contract-enforced here so an oversized artifact is rejected with a structured, self-correctable error rather than at render time.

html.description: The self-contained HTML document for the artifact (<= 16384 chars).

height.description: Fixed artifact height in CSS px (120-2000). Optional; the shell defaults it when absent.
